surfaces.description: Registry, DiagramKind, plugin registration, CLI capability metadata, and mutation-op projection.
Shared family detection and agent parse route the family consistently.
Modeled subset and source-preservation policy are explicit in code/docs.
Modeled and opaque/segment-preserved syntax round-trip without silent loss.
A public narrower and mutation ops are exposed; opaque fallback bodies stay source-level only.
Verification catches render-blocking conditions with named warning/error codes.
No ambient nondeterminism; repeated renders/layouts are stable or controlled by explicit options.
SVG/PNG-capable rendering path is covered.
ASCII/Unicode rendering path is covered.
layoutMermaid/verify layout expose truthful geometry for the family.
Region metadata for editor/TUI/accessibility is covered or tracked.
Live editor supported examples and glyphs cover the family.
Human docs, agent docs, SDK declarations, llms.txt, and skills are synchronized.
Shared skill benchmark includes a fixture-backed case tagged for the family.
Official upstream Mermaid examples/tests are harvested into an executable docs corpus, family bench, or accounted parser/DB bench.
Known compatibility divergences in harvested upstream examples/tests are executable and documented.
Family-specific semantic/layout invariants are tested beyond render smoke.
Goldens, snapshots, or reviewer evidence cover representative output.
Generated site samples/gallery surfaces cover the family.
Package files/exports/consumer init artifacts expose the family surface.
Targeted mutation/sabotage lane exists or is tracked.
